name: Siteminder Limited
analysis: SDR has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 51% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$3.9100, stop A$3.0492, target A$6.1700 (2.63:1) — then trail it.
